privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the portfolio data is synthetically generated via setup scripts. The expected post-split AAPL values (200.0 units, 92.6 price, 18520.0 value) correctly reflect a 2-for-1 split of the initial 100 units at 185.2. The expected MSFT and NVDA values match the unmodified synthetic setup data exactly. The portfolio file path is verified against the task configuration scripts.
